item.title: 👍Ken Sobel - Co-author Ryan’s Law CA (SB 311)
item.description: Ken Sobel signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Co-author Ryan’s Law CA (SB 311).

item.description: Michael Rochlin signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent American Cannabis Nurses Association (ACNA).

item.title: ❓💵Lisa Thatcher - Washington State Hospital Association
item.description: Lisa Thatcher signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Washington State Hospital Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.description: Alexandria Scoggins signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent American Cannabis Nurses Association.

item.title: House Passes “Ryan’s Law,” Restoring Compassion and Dignity to End-of-Life Care – Washington State House Democrats
item.description: News article "House Passes “Ryan’s Law,” Restoring Compassion and Dignity to End-of-Life Care – Washington State House Democrats" from House Democrats.
